snippet: Lady [Rohanne Webber](wiki:Rohanne_Webber) attempted to give Flame to Ser «Duncan the Tall» as a gift for his service and as an apology. The [hedge knight](wiki:Hedge_...
...all](wiki:Duncan_the_Tall) as a gift for his service and as an apology. The «hedge knight» refused, however, saying Flame was too good for him.(wiki:Flame.cite_ref-Rt...
She was magnificent. A better mount than any «the old man» had ever owned. You had only to look at those long, clean limbs to see how ...
